overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian robes exploring a sunlit temple complex. The character walks through hieroglyphic-covered corridors, crosses an open courtyard with palm trees, and enters the inner sanctum containing a sacred pool and golden shrine.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered temple corridor with hieroglyphic reliefs

events.description: exits the covered corridor into the open temple courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor following a child running ahead toward the exit

notable_agents.action: child running ahead through the corridor toward the courtyard

entered.detail: stone walls covered in colorful Egyptian hieroglyphic reliefs and figures
massive column with blue and yellow chevron patterns and hieroglyphics
metal lantern suspended from the ceiling of the corridor entrance
large stone archway marking the transition from corridor to courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow covered corridor flanked by walls covered in Egyptian hieroglyphics. A child runs ahead toward the bright exit. At around 6 seconds, the scene transitions from the shaded corridor into the sunlit temple courtyard ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple courtyard with ceremonial flower petals and palm trees

agents.ego_description: crossing the sunlit courtyard scattered with colorful flower petals, approaching the main temple entrance

entered.detail: grand temple front with massive columns and detailed hieroglyphic carvings
tall palm tree in a large decorated planter
metal fire bowl with flames on a tall stand
white fabric shade structure near the temple entrance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide-open courtyard bathed in bright sunlight. The ground is scattered with colorful flower petals. Large palm trees and burning braziers line the approach to the grand temple facade ahead, which features massive decorated columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand columned hypostyle hall with mixed torch and sunlight

events.description: enters the temple interior through the large doorway, moving from outdoor courtyard to indoor columned hall

agents.ego_description: walking into the temple interior between massive decorated columns, moving toward the inner sanctum

notable_agents.action: woman in white robes walking along the right wall

entered.detail: darkened doorway leading deeper into the temple sanctum
tall metal stand with burning flame providing interior lighting
enormous column with colorful geometric patterns and hieroglyphics

segments.scene_description: The character enters the temple interior, transitioning from bright sunlight to a semi-covered hall illuminated by both overhead openings and burning torches. Massive decorated columns line the path toward a dark inner doorway. A woman walks along the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner sanctum with sacred pool and golden shrine

events.description: enters the inner sanctum chamber containing the sacred pool and kneeling worshippers

agents.ego_description: walking around the sacred pool toward the golden shrine, observing the kneeling worshippers in prayer

notable_agents.action: worshipper kneeling in prayer beside the sacred pool
guard standing near the wall holding a spear

entered.detail: rectangular pool of green water surrounded by stone paving
elaborate golden statue shrine at the far end of the chamber
raised stone platform leading to the golden shrine

segments.scene_description: The character enters the innermost sanctum, a chamber dominated by a sacred pool surrounded by kneeling worshippers. The space is lit by torches and overhead light wells. The character walks around the pool toward a magnificent golden shrine at the far end, passing between massive decorated columns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded, narrow corridor into the expansive, sun-drenched heart of an ancient Egyptian temple. It begins within a covered walkway flanked by hieroglyphics, following a child who runs toward a bright exit. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into a wide courtyard bathed in brilliant sunlight, where flower petals scatter across the ground and burning braziers line the path toward a grand facade. The movement then shifts back into the semi-covered temple interior, transitioning from the glare of the sun to a hall illuminated by torches and overhead light wells. Finally, the camera glides through a dark doorway into the innermost sanctum, passing massive columns and kneeling worshippers to reach a magnificent golden shrine beside a sacred pool.
